MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PAUL RYAN ASSOCIATES, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED in its entirety. Plaintiff fails to maintain its initial summary adjudication burden. Plaintiff fails to show through competent evidence that defendant had any role in causing the damages sought by plaintiff. Based on the record on this motion, it is equally plausible that the sole negligence of one of defendant's agents caused the damage. Defendant's objections based on a lack of foundation to paragraphs 10 and 11 of the Nishimori declaration are sustained. Mr. Nishimori fails to explain how he has any basis to state that defendant was responsible for the damage. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE RELIABLE AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to September 20, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
